name: Sofia - Through the ruins
description:
Location: Burned Limb, Europe, Earth

Scavenging isn't easy business. The profession is monopolized by the local Prospector's Guild whom send the desperate and resourceful out of the safe walls of the havens they call home to fetch materials and nick-knacks for just about everyone. However, the scavenging has its risks, and they are not kind to the naive and under-prepped. Predatory supernatural entities and nigh-inexplicable phenomenon have become commonplace in the world since the day the realms collided.

Been a while since I made a bot, so I figured I'd make one for the event. Might make a series out of the setting if I got more ideas, but world's pretty bare-bones for the time being.
I tried to make the intro for this one as open-ended as I could so you'd have more freedom to choose your character/persona's background. It could've gone better imo, but my writing skills are pretty jank.

Inspired by the Rifts TTRPG, @Kaosin's Lost Angels setting, and the S.T.A.L.K.E.R. franchise.

God judging me for coming up with a concept that goes hard only for me to horribly butcher its execution:
creator: Hyjump
